testcase.name: verifyDropdown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.xpath: //div[contains(@class,'menu')] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.154, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Jack\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:65475}, goog:processID: 15152, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:65475/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.154, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: dd0b36c26564211f05c23613513a06c1 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at pages.HomePage.hoverMenu(HomePage.java:61) at tests.HomeTest.verifyDropdown(HomeTest.java:25) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 25 stack frames

testcase.name: verifyDashboard
